item.title: Agnes Martin, Geometry, & Mathopoetics: Incompleteness as Necessity
item.author: Shannon Kim
item.content:encoded:
Hi everyone!
I wanted to dedicate this video to SFMoMA’s Agnes Martin “chapel” on the fourth floor as I am finally graduating college and leaving the Bay Area for the foreseeable future…
I use her usage of the grid as not being about structure at all, but rather the necessary negation of it, of the idea of incompleteness being necessary in mathematics, poetry, and all practices of creation, I discuss the seeming impossibility of Euler’s Theorem, the imaginary number, Fred Moten’s mathopoetics, and the consequence of identity politics.
__________
BlackMagicDesign’s FREE DaVinci Resolve Software: https://www.blackmagicdesign.com/products/davinciresolve
__________
REFERENCES: Writings - Agnes Martin https://ia600605.us.archive.org/9/items/AgnesMartinWritings/Agnes%20Martin%20-%20Writings%20-%20Agnes%20Martin.pdf
Fermat's Last Theorem - Simon Singh https://dn721601.ca.archive.org/0/items/fermats-last-theorem-a-collection/Fermat%27s%20Enigma%20%28%20PDFDrive%20%29.pdf
Mathematics and Spiritual Interpretation: A Bridge to Genuine Interdisciplinarity - Ronald Glasberg https://www.zygonjournal.org/article/13149/galley/26675/view/
Paulin Hountondji: African Philosophy as Critical Universalism - Franziska Dübgen https://www.academia.edu/41532368/Paulin_Hountondji_African_Philosophy_as_Critical_Universalism
Going Public - Boris Groys https://www.are.na/block/263627
Visions of Excess: Selected Writings (1927-1939) - Georges Bataille https://cominsitu.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/visions-of-excess-selected-writings-1927-1939-by-georges-bataille-z-lib.org_-1.pdf
Refusing Completion: A Conversation (e-flux) - Fred Moten https://www.e-flux.com/journal/116/379446/refusing-completion-a-conversation
Cognitive Mapping - Frederic Jameson https://www.rainer-rilling.de/gs-villa07-Dateien/JamesonF86a_CognitiveMapping.pdf
Capital and Affects: The Politics of the Language Economy - Christian Marazzi https://www.rainer-rilling.de/gs-villa07-Dateien/JamesonF86a_CognitiveMapping.pdf
On the Mode of Existence of Technical Objects - Gilbert Simondon https://monoskop.org/images/2/20/Simondon_Gilbert_On_the_Mode_of_Existence_of_Technical_Objects_Part_I_alt.pdf
